title: Senior Financial Analyst - IIFL Finance International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IIFL Finance International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, IIFL Finance International Enterprises in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IIFL Finance International Enterprises:
IIFL Finance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance International Enterprises!
